description_long: This is a full-size computer keyboard featuring a standard array of alphanumeric keys, a numeric keypad, and function keys. The keycaps are light gray and appear to be made of plastic, set into a black base plate with visible mounting holes at the corners, suggesting it is designed for integration into a larger panel or system. The keyboard includes additional buttons and rotary dials on the right side, possibly for specialized input or control functions. The underlying circuit board and some electronic components are visible along the edges, indicating an industrial or technical application. There are no visible branding marks or decorative elements, and the overall design is utilitarian. The keyboard shows some signs of age or use, with slight discoloration on the keycaps.
description: A full-size, industrial-style keyboard with light gray keycaps, a black mounting plate, and visible circuit board elements. Includes a numeric keypad and extra control dials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full key layout, including the alphanumeric section and numeric keypad.
description_view_1: Side angle highlighting the height of the keycaps and the exposed circuit board on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the key rows and more of the circuit board and electronic components.
description_view_3: Opposite side angle focusing on the numeric keypad and additional control dials.
